Please analyze all the information provided below and generate a final, high-quality SVG code. The original design goal was: "A combination of blue and green horizontal rectangles and lines arranged in a structured layout represents a webpage or user interface design."; a draft SVG code that needs improvement is as follows: ```xml
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200"><path fill="#E8EFF8" d="M0 0 L200 0 C200 0 200 0 200 0 L200 200 C200 200 200 200 200 200 L0 200 C0 200 0 200 0 200 L0 0 C0 0 0 0 0 0 Z" />
<path fill="#247ADE" d="M27 127 A5 5 0 0 1 32 123 L168 123 A5 5 0 0 1 173 127 L173 150 A5 5 0 0 1 168 155 L32 155 A5 5 0 0 1 27 150 L27 127 Z" />
<path fill="#69CB91" d="M27 86 A5 5 0 0 1 32 82 L109 82 A5 5 0 0 1 114 86 L114 109 A5 5 0 0 1 109 114 L32 114 A5 5 0 0 1 27 109 L27 86 Z" />
<path fill="#A0BFF7" d="M114 45 A5 5 0 0 0 109 41 L32 41 A5 5 0 0 0 27 45 L27 68 A5 5 0 0 0 32 73 L109 73 A5 5 0 0 0 114 68 L114 45 Z M150 45 A5 5 0 0 0 145 41 L127 41 A5 5 0 0 0 123 45 L123 68 A5 5 0 0 0 127 73 L145 73 A5 5 0 0 0 150 68 L150 45 Z" /></svg>
```; an expert critique of this draft is: "The draft image shows a basic arrangement of blue and green rectangles, which aligns with the original design prompt of representing a webpage or user interface design. However, compared to the high-quality reference version, the draft lacks complexity and structure. The reference image demonstrates a more sophisticated layout with varied rectangle sizes and a more balanced distribution of colors. The reference also includes additional elements such as lines that add to the overall design, which are missing in the draft. The color palette in the draft is less vibrant and lacks the contrast seen in the reference, which uses a more diverse range of blue and green shades."; and the specific modification suggestions are: 1. Introduce more varied rectangle sizes and positions to create a more dynamic layout. 2. Add horizontal lines to enhance the structured layout and mimic the reference design. 3. Use a broader range of blue and green shades to increase visual interest and contrast. 4. Ensure the overall composition is balanced, similar to the reference image, by adjusting the spacing and alignment of elements.. Please strictly follow these suggestions to improve the draft and directly output the final, refined SVG code.

Please analyze all the information provided below and generate a final, high-quality SVG code. The original design goal was: "A blue and cyan battery icon indicates energy or power levels."; a draft SVG code that needs improvement is as follows: ```xml
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200"><path fill="#00efd1" d="M179 112 L179 162 C179 173 171 181 161 181 L39 181 C29 181 21 173 21 162 L21 112 L179 112 Z" />
<path fill="#00acea" d="M179 38 L179 112 L21 112 L21 38 C21 27 29 19 39 19 L161 19 C171 19 179 27 179 38 Z" />
<path fill="#083863" d="M161 15 L39 15 C27 15 17 25 17 38 L17 162 C17 175 27 185 39 185 L161 185 C173 185 183 175 183 162 L183 38 C183 25 173 15 161 15 Z M39 23 L161 23 C169 23 175 30 175 38 L175 108 L25 108 L25 38 C25 30 31 23 39 23 Z M175 162 C175 170 169 177 161 177 L39 177 C31 177 25 170 25 162 L25 116 L175 116 L175 162 Z" />
<path fill="#083863" d="M100 131 C98 131 96 133 96 135 L96 160 C96 162 98 164 100 164 C102 164 104 162 104 160 L104 135 C104 133 102 131 100 131 Z" />
<path fill="#083863" d="M100 44 C98 44 96 46 96 48 L96 73 C96 75 98 77 100 77 C102 77 104 75 104 73 L104 48 C104 46 102 44 100 44 Z" />
<path fill="#083863" d="M153 131 C151 131 149 133 149 135 L149 160 C149 162 151 164 153 164 C155 164 157 162 157 160 L157 135 C157 133 155 131 153 131 Z" />
<path fill="#083863" d="M47 131 C45 131 43 133 43 135 L43 160 C43 162 45 164 47 164 C49 164 51 162 51 160 L51 135 C51 133 49 131 47 131 Z" />
<path fill="#083863" d="M131 131 C129 131 127 133 127 135 L127 160 C127 162 129 164 131 164 C133 164 135 162 135 160 L135 135 C135 133 133 131 131 131 Z" />
<path fill="#083863" d="M69 131 C67 131 65 133 65 135 L65 160 C65 162 67 164 69 164 C71 164 73 162 73 160 L73 135 C73 133 71 131 69 131 Z" /></svg>
```; an expert critique of this draft is: "The draft image diverges significantly from the reference version and the original design prompt. The draft features a square design with a segmented lower section, which does not resemble a battery icon. The color scheme of blue and cyan is present, but the overall shape and design do not convey the concept of a battery or energy levels effectively. In contrast, the reference image clearly depicts a battery with a vertical orientation and a distinct top section, which is more aligned with typical battery iconography. The reference also uses a gradient effect to enhance the visual appeal and convey a sense of energy flow, which is absent in the draft."; and the specific modification suggestions are: 1. Redesign the shape to more closely resemble a traditional battery, with a vertical orientation and a distinct top section. 2. Incorporate a gradient effect to enhance the visual representation of energy flow, similar to the reference image. 3. Simplify the design by removing unnecessary segments and focusing on a clear, recognizable battery shape. 4. Ensure the color balance between blue and cyan is harmonious and supports the overall energy theme.. Please strictly follow these suggestions to improve the draft and directly output the final, refined SVG code.

Please analyze all the information provided below and generate a final, high-quality SVG code. The original design goal was: "A brown wallet with a light beige accent and a yellow button represents saving or spending money."; a draft SVG code that needs improvement is as follows: ```xml
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200"><path fill="#E8CD97" d="M166 156 L70 156 C66 156 62 152 62 148 L62 85 C62 80 66 77 70 77 L166 77 L166 156 Z" />
<path fill="#472F17" d="M166 161 L33 161 C25 161 18 154 18 146 L18 53 C18 45 25 38 33 38 L166 38 C174 38 181 45 181 53 L181 146 C181 154 174 161 166 161 Z M33 48 C30 48 28 50 28 53 L28 146 C28 149 30 151 33 151 L166 151 C169 151 171 149 171 146 L171 53 C171 50 169 48 166 48 L33 48 Z" />
<path fill="#472F17" d="M184 121 L126 121 C112 121 101 110 101 96 L101 95 C101 82 112 71 126 71 L184 71 L184 81 L126 81 C117 81 111 88 111 95 L111 96 C111 104 117 111 126 111 L184 111 L184 121 Z" />
<path fill="#472F17" d="M117 96 A8 8 0 1 0 133 96 A8 8 0 1 0 117 96 Z" />
<path fill="#472F17" d="M37 95 L18 95 L18 74 L37 74 L37 95 Z M18 85 L27 85 L27 80 L18 80 L18 85 Z" /></svg>
```; an expert critique of this draft is: "The draft image presents a wallet design that partially adheres to the original prompt. The color scheme in the draft uses a brown and beige palette, which aligns with the prompt, but the execution differs significantly from the reference. The draft's geometric construction is more abstract and less realistic compared to the reference, which features a more traditional wallet shape with rounded corners and a clear flap. The draft lacks the depth and shading present in the reference, which contributes to a less polished appearance. Additionally, the button in the draft is not as prominently featured as in the reference, where it serves as a focal point."; and the specific modification suggestions are: 1. Adjust the wallet's shape to have rounded corners and a more traditional wallet appearance, similar to the reference. 2. Enhance the shading and depth to give the wallet a more three-dimensional look. 3. Increase the prominence of the button by making it larger and more central, as seen in the reference. 4. Consider using a more muted brown tone for the wallet to better match the reference's color palette.. Please strictly follow these suggestions to improve the draft and directly output the final, refined SVG code.

Please analyze all the information provided below and generate a final, high-quality SVG code. The original design goal was: "A blue hand icon clicks on a blue and orange split circle against a light blue and white screen background."; a draft SVG code that needs improvement is as follows: ```xml
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200"><path fill="#e6f7ff" d="M194 12 L6 12 C3 12 0 14 0 18 L0 111 L6 123 L194 123 L200 111 L200 18 C200 14 197 12 194 12 Z" />

<path fill="#7adfe3" d="M29 94 C26 94 23 97 23 100 L23 123 L35 123 L35 100 C35 97 32 94 29 94 Z" />
<path fill="#55b3dc" d="M171 94 C168 94 165 97 165 100 L165 123 L177 123 L177 100 C177 97 174 94 171 94 Z" />
<path fill="#ff9100" d="M177 65 A65 65 0 1 1 47 65 A65 65 0 1 1 177 65 Z" />
<path fill="#ff641a" d="M177 65 C177 31 149 2 115 2 L115 130 C149 130 177 101 177 65 Z" />
<path fill="#ffdecf" d="M147 106 C141 106 136 108 132 112 L132 65 C132 59 127 53 121 53 C114 53 109 59 109 65 L109 112 C104 108 99 106 94 106 C87 106 82 111 82 118 L82 171 C82 174 84 177 88 177 L159 177 C162 177 165 174 165 171 L165 118 C165 111 159 106 153 106 C151 106 149 106 147 106 Z" />
<path fill="#ffcdbe" d="M165 171 L165 118 C165 111 159 106 153 106 C151 106 149 106 147 106 C141 106 136 108 132 112 L132 65 C132 59 127 53 121 53 L121 177 L159 177 C162 177 165 174 165 171 Z" /></svg>
```; an expert critique of this draft is: "The draft image significantly deviates from the original design prompt and the reference version. The draft features a hand icon that is not blue, and the circle is not split into blue and orange as specified. Instead, the draft has a predominantly orange circle with a small orange segment. The background does not resemble a screen, and the color scheme is not consistent with the light blue and white background described in the prompt. The reference version, however, adheres closely to the prompt with a blue hand icon, a blue and orange split circle, and a screen-like background with a light blue and white color scheme."; and the specific modification suggestions are: 1. Change the color of the hand icon to blue to match the original design prompt. 2. Modify the circle to be split evenly into blue and orange halves. 3. Adjust the background to resemble a screen with a light blue and white color scheme. 4. Ensure the overall composition aligns with the prompt by incorporating a screen-like element in the background.. Please strictly follow these suggestions to improve the draft and directly output the final, refined SVG code.
